title: Part 3 – Conversation : congé maladie
instructions: Écoutez la conversation, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Woman: Hi, I'm calling to let you know I won't be in today. I've been unwell since last night and my doctor advised me to rest. Man: I'm sorry to hear that. Do you need to take the whole day off? Woman: Yes, most likely. I might be able to work from home this afternoon if I feel better. Man: Don't worry about it. Just focus on getting well. Do you want me to let the team know? Woman: Yes please, and could you also tell Mr. Reed that I won't be able to attend the ten o'clock call? Man: Of course. Get well soon.

choices: To report a problem at work
To say she will not come in today
To ask for a schedule change
To request information from a colleague
questions.explanation: Elle appelle pour dire qu'elle sera absente du bureau car elle est malade.

questions.prompt: What might the woman do in the afternoon?
choices: Work from home if she feels better
Take part in a training session
questions.explanation: "I might be able to work from home this afternoon if I feel better".

questions.prompt: What does the woman ask the man to tell Mr. Reed?
choices: That she won't attend the ten o'clock call
That she needs the meeting notes
That the call should be rescheduled
questions.explanation: "could you also tell Mr. Reed that I won't be able to attend the ten o'clock call?".
